purpose: Current problem audit after user reported that the project still shows only 8 complete pages after multiple days.

problems.summary: The main completion number is structurally stalled at 8.
problems.evidence: audit_openusd_translation_quality.mjs only emits good_bilingual when the inventory status is bilingual_complete; prior refinement scripts add Chinese guidance to bilingual_draft pages but do not promote them to bilingual_complete.
problems.required_action: Define and implement a promotion path from draft_needs_translation to bilingual_complete/good_bilingual, then verify that good_bilingual increases.

problems.summary: The final entry can mislead users by showing pending=0 while 398 pages are still incomplete drafts.
problems.evidence: openusd_bilingual_final.html labels 398 pages as Draft and 0 as Pending; users reasonably read this as almost complete.
problems.required_action: Change final entry wording so bilingual_draft means incomplete translation, not completed work.

problems.summary: The old heartbeat automation optimized for repeated 5-page refinement and GitHub sync rather than real completion progress.
problems.evidence: Recent rounds repeatedly recorded that counts remained unchanged and treated that as expected.
problems.required_action: Update automation prompt so it refuses to continue round-churn unless it improves completion criteria, user-facing honesty, or a concrete browsing defect.

problems.summary: Many clicks still route to the local uncovered placeholder because the 406-page inventory does not contain every official Doxygen target.
problems.evidence: local_link_routing_report records thousands of uncovered links; this is intentional by policy but still a user-visible browsing gap.
problems.required_action: Prioritize high-click navigation and TOC links for local anchors or inventory expansion; do not present placeholder routing as a finished reading experience.

problems.summary: Most draft pages contain Chinese guidance and term notes, not paragraph-level bilingual translation.
problems.evidence: 387 pages remain draft_needs_translation; 11 pages remain draft_template_only.
problems.required_action: For selected high-value pages, replace or supplement guide-only blocks with dense paragraph-level bilingual coverage and then promote status only if the page passes the stricter rule.

problems.summary: validation_report.json was written with UTF-8 BOM, which breaks standard Node JSON.parse.
problems.evidence: A direct JSON.parse of reports/validation_report.json failed on the leading BOM.
problems.required_action: Write validation_report.json as UTF-8 without BOM and keep the report parseable by both PowerShell and Node.

next_actions: Regenerate the final entry with honest draft wording.
Fix validation_report.json to be UTF-8 without BOM.
Sync this problem audit into the openusd automation prompt.
Before any future translation round, implement or document the draft-to-complete promotion rule.
